task_completion.description: Create a new license for DaVinci Resolve Studio with the specified details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a license list or detail page showing the name 'DaVinci Resolve Studio - Node Locked', Manufacturer 'Blackmagic Design', 3 total seats, and a purchase cost of $295.00.

task_completion.description: Assign the 3 DaVinci Resolve seats to the specified render nodes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the license details for 'DaVinci Resolve Studio - Node Locked' and verify that seats are checked out specifically to the assets 'RENDER-NODE-01', 'RENDER-NODE-02', and 'RENDER-NODE-03' (ensure they are assigned to assets, not users).

task_completion.description: Check in the Maxon Redshift seat currently assigned to RENDER-NODE-04.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Maxon Redshift' license details or history and verify that 'RENDER-NODE-04' is no longer listed as having a checked-out seat, or look for a successful check-in confirmation message.

task_completion.description: Reassign the Maxon Redshift seat to RENDER-NODE-01.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Maxon Redshift' license details and verify that a seat is now checked out to the asset 'RENDER-NODE-01'.
Look at the hardware assets list or the specific detail page for 'RENDER-NODE-04' and verify its status badge or text has been updated to 'Retired'.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface of the asset management system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating an IT asset management system (like Snipe-IT), not terminal commands or API scripts executing the changes.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual application rather than a text editor or mock file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should show standard web application elements (menus, tables, forms, buttons) being clicked and filled out, not a code editor or plain text file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) should not be open and used to manually alter the HTML text to show success states.
